title_hero.label: Cover hero
title_hero.content_recipe: Deck subtitle line, lead sentence, 3–4 opening bullets.
title_hero.html_prompt: Centered hero filling full frame: deck name, large title, subtitle, bullets.

slots.label: Subtitle
slots.recipe: One deck subtitle line (not the main slide title).

slots.label: Lead
slots.recipe: One opening lead sentence for the cover.

title_content.label: Title + body
title_content.html_prompt: Top bar + title; body fill area with lead + bullets using vertical space.

two_column.label: Two column
two_column.content_recipe: 5–6 bullets for the left column + one short paragraph (1–2 sentences) for the right callout insight.
two_column.html_prompt: Full-height two columns: bullets left (vertically centered), tall callout right.

slots.label: Left column
slots.recipe: 5–6 bullets for the main left column.

slots.label: Right callout
slots.recipe: 1–2 sentence insight for the right callout (no bullets).

three_cards.label: Three cards
three_cards.content_recipe: Use exactly ### 區塊一 / ### 區塊二 / ### 區塊三 — each with 2–3 substantive bullets (real teaching points, not meta labels).
three_cards.html_prompt: Three equal-height cards in a row filling the body area below the title.

slots.label: Card 1
slots.recipe: ### 區塊一 heading + 2–3 real teaching bullets.

slots.label: Card 2
slots.recipe: ### 區塊二 heading + 2–3 real teaching bullets.

slots.label: Card 3
slots.recipe: ### 區塊三 heading + 2–3 real teaching bullets.

summary.label: Summary
summary.html_prompt: Summary box stretches to fill lower body with 4–6 bullets.

slots.label: Takeaways
slots.recipe: 5–6 closing takeaway bullets with action verbs.

section_divider.label: Section break
section_divider.content_recipe: One subtitle line + optional single bullet.
section_divider.html_prompt: Full-bleed section break — big title, minimal bullets.

slots.label: Subtitle
slots.recipe: One section subtitle line under the section title.

faq_split.label: FAQ split
faq_split.content_recipe: 4 question bullets (short) then 3–4 answer lines starting with '答：' or second-level bullets.
faq_split.html_prompt: FAQ: question bullets left, answer blocks right — distinct from two_column.

slots.label: Answers
slots.recipe: 3–4 answer bullets; each line MUST start with '答：'.

metric_row.label: Metrics row
metric_row.content_recipe: 3 lines like '指標一：具體數字或結果' / '指標二：…' / '指標三：…' (value + explanation).
metric_row.html_prompt: Three large metric values with labels (use 指標：說明 or short value + label lines).

slots.label: Metrics
slots.recipe: Exactly 3 KPI bullets: '- 指標名：具體說明'.

quote_focus.label: Quote focus
quote_focus.content_recipe: One strong pull-quote sentence (plain line), then 4–5 supporting bullets.
quote_focus.html_prompt: Large pull-quote left, supporting bullets right.

slots.label: Quote
slots.recipe: One strong pull-quote sentence (plain text, no bullets).

pptx_master.label: PPTX positioned master
pptx_master.content_recipe: Fill each data-slot region; slots come from PPTX geometry.
pptx_master.html_prompt: Preserve absolute slot positions from imported PPTX master.

bullets.label: Bullets (alias)
bullets.html_prompt: Title + bullet body filling vertical space.
